onCreateCommand:
unset LD_LIBRARY_PATH && echo '#!/bin/bash
unset LD_LIBRARY_PATH
/usr/bin/apt $@' > /usr/local/bin/apt && chmod a+x /usr/local/bin/apt && apt-get update && apt-get install -y emacs
postCreateCommand: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/galacticusorg/datasets.git /workspaces/datasets && export LD_LIBRARY_PATH=/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu && wget -q https://github.com/galacticusorg/galacticus/releases/download/bleeding-edge/tools.tar.bz2 -O $GALACTICUS_DATA_PATH/tools.tar.bz2 && cd $GALACTICUS_DATA_PATH && tar xfj tools.tar.bz2 && rm tools.tar.bz2
